ddls:
CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "birth_year" INTEGER /* Year of birth */,
  "education" TEXT /* Level of education */,
  "marital_status" TEXT /* Marital status */,
  "income" INTEGER /* Annual income */,
  "kidhome" INTEGER /* Number of children at home */,
  "teenhome" INTEGER /* Number of teenagers at home */,
  "customer_since" TEXT /* Date the customer joined */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "last_purchase_date" TEXT /* Date of the last purchase */,
  "total_spent" REAL /* Total amount spent by the customer */,
  "loyalty_program_member" INTEGER /* Indicates if the customer is a member of the loyalty program */,
  "preferred_channel" TEXT /* Preferred communication channel of the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "marketing_campaigns" (
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each marketing campaign */,
  "campaign_name" TEXT /* Name of the marketing campaign */,
  "campaign_type" TEXT /* Type of marketing campaign (e.g., web, email, direct mail) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the marketing campaign */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the marketing campaign */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the campaign */,
  "actual_spend" REAL /* Actual amount spent on the campaign */,
  "target_segment" TEXT /* Target customer segment for the campaign */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the campaign */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the campaign was created */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the campaign (e.g., planned, active, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("campaign_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "purchases" (
  "purchase_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each purchase */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who made the purchase */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date of the purchase */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the purchase */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product purchased */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product purchased */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product purchased */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Shipping address for the purchase */,
  "order_status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("purchase_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_purchases_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "website_visits" (
  "visit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each website visit */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who visited the website */,
  "visit_date" TEXT /* Date of the website visit */,
  "pages_visited" INTEGER /* Number of pages visited during the session */,
  "visit_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the visit in seconds */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used (e.g., desktop, mobile, tablet) */,
  "referral_source" TEXT /* Source of the visit (e.g., Google, direct, newsletter) */,
  "first_visit" INTEGER /* Indicates if this is the customer's first visit to the website */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_website_visits_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "campaign_responses" (
  "response_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each response */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who responded */,
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* ID of the marketing campaign */,
  "response_date" TEXT /* Date of the response */,
  "response_type" TEXT /* Type of response (e.g., open, click, conversion) */,
  "response_channel" TEXT /* Channel through which the response was received (e.g., email, web form) */,
  "conversion_amount" REAL /* Amount of the conversion (if applicable) */,
  "conversion_date" TEXT /* Date of the conversion */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("response_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaign_responses_campaign_id FOREIGN KEY ("campaign_id") REFERENCES marketing_campaigns ("campaign_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaign_responses_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_segments" (
  "segment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer segment */,
  "segment_name" TEXT /* Name of the customer segment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the customer segment */,
  "target_audience" TEXT /* Target audience for the segment */,
  "segment_criteria" TEXT /* Detailed criteria for the segment */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the segment was created */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date the segment was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("segment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_segment_memberships" (
  "membership_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each membership */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "segment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the segment */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the customer joined the segment */,
  "exit_date" TEXT /* Date the customer exited the segment (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("membership_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_segment_memberships_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_segment_memberships_segment_id FOREIGN KEY ("segment_id") REFERENCES customer_segments ("segment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., marketer, sales, support) */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the user was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Permission granted to the user (e.g., view customers, edit campaigns) */,
  "granted_by" TEXT /* User who granted the permission */,
  "granted_date" TEXT /* Date the permission was granted */,
  "expired_date" TEXT /* Date the permission will expire (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "campaign_analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics record */,
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* ID of the campaign */,
  "metric" TEXT /* Metric being measured (e.g., open rate, click-through rate) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "metric_type" TEXT /* Type of metric (e.g., engagement, conversion) */,
  "metric_date" TEXT /* Date of the metric */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the metric (e.g., web, email) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaign_analytics_campaign_id FOREIGN KEY ("campaign_id") REFERENCES marketing_campaigns ("campaign_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback record */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date of the feedback */,
  "feedback" TEXT /* Feedback from the customer */,
  "feedback_type" TEXT /* Type of feedback (e.g., positive, negative) */,
  "feedback_rating" INTEGER /* Rating for the feedback (e.g., on a scale of 1-5) */,
  "resolved" INTEGER /* Indicates if the feedback has been resolved */,
  "resolved_date" TEXT /* Date the feedback was resolved */,
  "resolved_by" TEXT /* User who resolved the feedback */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_feedback_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)
